name: Torus
summary: Represents the value of a plane and two radii in a torus that is oriented in three-dimensional space.

constructors.name: Torus
constructors.signature: public Torus(Plane basePlane, double majorRadius, double minorRadius)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new Torus from base pane and two radii.

params.name: basePlane
params.doc: Base plane for major radius circle.

params.name: majorRadius
params.doc: Radius of circle that lies at the heart of the torus.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Torus other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: ToNurbsSurface
methods.summary: Converts this torus to its NURBS surface representation. This is synonymous with calling NurbsSurface.CreateFromTorus().

returns.doc: A NURBS surface representation of this torus, or null on error.

methods.name: ToRevSurface
methods.summary: Convert this torus to a surface of revolution representation. This is synonymous with calling RevSurface.CreateFromTorus().

returns.doc: A surface of revolution representation of this torus, or null on error.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this torus is valid.

properties.name: MajorRadius
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius of the circle that lies at the heart of the torus.

properties.name: MinorRadius
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius of the torus section.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the plane for the torus large circle.
